summary: This course focuses on English reading, mainly of news articles and academic papers in the medical field.
aims: Students will improve their ability to quickly and accurately read and analyze English texts, particularly in the medical field. Students will also improve their English vocabulary and grammar.
goals: Students will learn to quickly identify the main points of a text and produce a summary.
Students will improve their ability to understand details of a text.
Students will improve their English vocabulary, particularly in the medical field, and their understanding of English grammar.

plan.text: Introduction to course: Objectives, assessment, syllabus

Text 1: Process of becoming a doctor in the US (news article)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 2: Age and happiness (news article)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 3: Early prevention of food allergies (news article)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 4: Treatments for food allergies (news article)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 5: Story of man who sailed across Pacific during pandemic (news article)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 6: Students' choice
Students will summarize the text of their choice, in English and Japanese, and discuss in groups.

Text 7: The Last Leaf, by O. Henry (short story)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 8: The finding of rapamycin (radio story)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 9: The development of mRNA vaccines (radio story)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 10: Diet and heart disease (academic study)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 11: Health effects of a vegan diet (academic study)
Students will answer comprehension questions, summarize the text, etc., and ask the teacher about any parts they do not understand.

Text 14: Students' choice
Students will summarize the text of their choice, in English and Japanese, and discuss in groups.

textbooks: The instructor will provide all necessary materials.
prereq: Some background in English conversation / reading; a positive attitude
prep: Students will spend 30-60 minutes reading at home to prepare for each class, and studying texts to prepare for quizzes.
